calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM - TRIAL COURT CALENDAR
Off Calendar Nov-13-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Feleke Migra, Plaintiff; Joycelyn Gapiane, representative for the City and County of San Francisco ["CCSF"], Defendant.

Plaintiff Migra presents his case. Ms. Gapiane, on behalf of Defendant CCSF, presents the City's case, to wit: no evidence of auto insurance for the taxi cab. Upon inquiry by the court, Plaintiff is unable to show evidence of auto insurance. No exhibits are identified or admitted into evidence. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Hon. Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. [D306]

CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00
